name: Fabricio Werdum
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 4 Top-5+ wins, 7 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: Interim and undisputed heavyweight champion with a signature submission of Cain Velasquez and seven finishes in ten UFC wins.
bestArgument: Werdum owns one of the strongest heavyweight wins ever, added an interim title, and beat elite heavyweights across multiple styles.
counterArgument: Only two UFC title-fight wins, four UFC losses, and no successful undisputed defense keep him below the top heavyweight champions. PRIDE and Strikeforce are excluded.
whyRankedHere: Werdum owns one of the strongest heavyweight wins ever, added an interim title, and beat elite heavyweights across multiple styles.
whyNotHigher: Only two UFC title-fight wins, four UFC losses, and no successful undisputed defense keep him below the top heavyweight champions. PRIDE and Strikeforce are excluded.
finalTakeaway: Interim and undisputed heavyweight champion with a signature submission of Cain Velasquez and seven finishes in ten UFC wins.
